summary: Phase 06 is close: governed route integrity is acceptable, required phase tests were rerun successfully, and the durable runtime/FastAPI implementation fits the intended architecture. The phase still cannot unlock because the runbook now declares a reproducible `python -m uvicorn ...` operator path, but `uvicorn` is not declared in the project install path, so docs and executable operator behavior are not yet closed.

blockers.title: Runbook promises an ASGI boot path that the project does not install
blockers.why: `docs/runbooks/app/bootstrap.md` says the product-plane baseline has one reproducible dependency path via `pip install -e .[dev]`, then instructs the operator to start the Phase 06 API with `python -m uvicorn trading_advisor_3000.app.interfaces.asgi:app`. `pyproject.toml` adds `fastapi` and `psycopg`, but not `uvicorn`, so the documented operator route is not actually guaranteed by the repo-managed environment. Phase acceptance rules require docs and operator behavior to match the implementation.
blockers.remediation: Either add `uvicorn` to the supported install path used by the runbook, or change the runbook to the real supported launch method and prove that documented path from a clean repo-managed environment. Then rerun the phase-06 checks and acceptance.

rerun_checks: python scripts/run_loop_gate.py --changed-files pyproject.toml src/trading_advisor_3000/app/runtime/bootstrap.py src/trading_advisor_3000/app/runtime/__init__.py src/trading_advisor_3000/app/interfaces/asgi.py tests/app/unit/test_phase6_runtime_durable_bootstrap.py tests/app/unit/test_phase6_fastapi_smoke.py tests/app/unit/test_phase6_runtime_profile_ops.py tests/app/integration/test_phase2c_runtime_postgres_store.py docs/architecture/app/STATUS.md docs/architecture/app/stack-conformance-baseline.md docs/runbooks/app/bootstrap.md registry/stack_conformance.yaml docs/session_handoff.md docs/tasks/active/index.yaml docs/tasks/active/TASK-2026-03-27-continue-governed-module-phase-06-worker-route-f.md
